rubric.1: Straight, wide roads with gentle gradients
rubric.2: Some curves, good visibility, two-lane roads
rubric.5: Expert-level: single-lane hairpins, cobbled descents, poor surface

rubric.2: Good asphalt with minor rough patches
rubric.3: Mix of good and fair surfaces, some patching
rubric.4: Rough surfaces, cobblestones sections, patched roads
rubric.5: Significant cobbles, strade bianche, deteriorated surfaces

rubric.2: Mild heat or cold possible, minimal wind
rubric.3: Moderate heat/cold likely, some wind exposure
rubric.4: High heat, strong winds, or unpredictable mountain weather
rubric.5: Extreme: alpine weather changes, snow risk on passes, severe heat
Extreme altitude: 2,500m+ summit finishes (Stelvio, Galibier, Ventoux)

rubric.1: City center start, airport <30min, ample lodging and transport
rubric.2: Major town, airport 30-60min, good lodging options
rubric.3: Regional town, airport 1-2hr, adequate but limited lodging
rubric.4: Small town, airport 2-3hr, lodging books up early
rubric.5: Remote mountain village, airport 3hr+, very limited lodging

rubric.1: Local charity ride or small club event, no media coverage
rubric.2: Regional event with local cycling media coverage
rubric.4: Major international event, strong media coverage, well-known name
rubric.5: Iconic: UCI-recognized, massive field, pro route heritage, bucket-list status

rubric.1: Basic: volunteer-only, partial road closures, no timing
rubric.2: Decent: some road closures, chip timing, basic aid
rubric.3: Good: full road closures, reliable timing, good feed zones
rubric.4: Very good: moto escort, medical support, pro-level timing
rubric.5: Elite: military-grade logistics, full closures, real-time tracking, neutral support

rubric.3: Beautiful route with several memorable sections
rubric.4: Stunning scenery throughout, multiple jaw-drop moments
rubric.5: Breathtaking: Dolomites, coastal cliffs, volcanic roads — once-in-a-lifetime

rubric.3: Good community, nice post-ride party or village atmosphere
rubric.4: Strong culture: enthusiastic crowds, great pasta party, local pride
rubric.5: Legendary: tifosi energy, deep cycling heritage, pilgrimage-level devotion

rubric.2: Some competitive riders, informal age-group rankings
rubric.3: Structured competitive waves, official age-group prizes
rubric.4: Strong amateur field, some ex-pros, national-level athletes
rubric.5: Elite: ex-pros, national champions, UCI GF points on offer

rubric.1: Overpriced: high entry fee, minimal inclusions
rubric.2: Below average: fee doesn't match the experience
rubric.3: Fair: entry fee reasonable for what you get
rubric.4: Good value: includes jersey/meals/photos or other extras
rubric.5: Exceptional: entry includes jersey, meals, massage, photos, transport

bonus_dimension.label: Cultural Impact
bonus_dimension.note: Additive bonus, not included in denominator. Events like L'Eroica, Maratona get 4-5. Most events get 0.
